query: Find 10 buildings in Trondheim municipality that intersect quick-clay hazard areas with high risk class, sorted by bygningid ascending.

1.description: get Trondheim municipality geometry by kommunenummer

2.description: get highest quick-clay risk class identifier

3.description: get quick-clay hazard areas with highest risk class, filtered by municipality geometry

4.description: get buildings in Trondheim municipality by kommunenummer

5.description: find buildings intersecting quick-clay hazard areas

6.description: keep only bygningid and geometry for deduplication

7.description: one row per building using MIN(distance) as tie-breaker

final.sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT geom FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenummer = '5001';
